mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_course WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_student WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_teacher WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_question WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_exam_record WHERE DATE(submit_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_student WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_course_order WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM edu_homework_correction WHERE status IN (0, 1)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(es.id) AS count FROM ( SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL seq DAY AS date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14 UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19 UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 21 UNION SELECT 22 UNION SELECT 23 UNION SELECT 24 UNION SELECT 25 UNION SELECT 26 UNION SELECT 27 UNION SELECT 28 UNION SELECT 29 ) AS days ) d LEFT JOIN edu_student es ON DATE(es.create_time) = d.date AND es.deleted = 0 GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(o.id) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(o.amount), 0) AS income FROM ( SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL seq DAY AS date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS seq UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 UNION SELECT 13 UNION SELECT 14 UNION SELECT 15 UNION SELECT 16 UNION SELECT 17 UNION SELECT 18 UNION SELECT 19 UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 21 UNION SELECT 22 UNION SELECT 23 UNION SELECT 24 UNION SELECT 25 UNION SELECT 26 UNION SELECT 27 UNION SELECT 28 UNION SELECT 29 ) AS days ) d LEFT JOIN edu_course_order o ON DATE(o.create_time) = d.date AND o.status = 1 GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN is_pass = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, SUM(CASE WHEN is_pass = 0 AND status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending FROM edu_exam_record WHERE MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE())
SELECT id, name, student_count AS studentCount FROM edu_course WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY student_count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT nick_name AS studentName, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS loginTime, ip FROM sys_access_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT nick_name AS operator, content, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') AS time FROM sys_opera_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 10
